questions.question: Write a TypeScript function that reads ~/.secrets/agents.env and loads it into process.env. Skip comments and blank lines. Never override existing env vars.
Write a bash one-liner that finds all .ts files modified in the last 24 hours under the current directory.
Write a Python function that retries an HTTP GET call up to 3 times with exponential backoff starting at 1 second.
Write a systemd user service unit file for a Node.js script at /home/dusan/app/index.js that uses EnvironmentFile=/home/dusan/.secrets/agents.env
Write a git pre-commit hook that blocks commits containing strings that look like API keys (matching pattern sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{32,}).
